subject: New Opening: Java Developer – Java – Public sector
body:
Hi,

We have a new opening in the public sector sector that might be of interest.

Our client is looking for a junior Java Developer with strong experience in Java. The right candidate has solid knowledge of:
• Java
• Azure
• PostgreSQL
• RabbitMQ
• TensorFlow

Details:
Client: Riksdata
Start: 2024-11-21
Duration: 12 months
Location: Malmö (hybrid)
Rate: up to 725 SEK/h

Don't hesitate to get in touch!

Best regards,
Viktor Olsson
Tech Recruitment Lead
ByteForce
Tel: +46 76 677 89 01
